textByHash.079bbc4e7dc09c8c662572cd6d551523aba01e13: Just because he's a surface-dweller, doesn't mean he's ! There are lots of surface-dwellers!
textByHash.0e3eac9f967474dee52157deedede479749818bb: I'm sure you look just as funny to the surface-dweller!
textByHash.336a066f0ab6fcd13d306d974569c7f4075f473b: Zanik told me about you! I'm so pleased to meet you!
textByHash.64be65e46a7c6440ca417ec4a782fb6459881914: Just because she's a surface-dweller, doesn't mean he's ! There are lots of surface-dwellers!
textByHash.662b825da976af812ec8a6ee24a1143068ad450c: There's no need to be rude!
textByHash.961ebe57137cbc7d338f2b50b813539f037a7d93: Well don't blame me if he doesn't want to talk to you either!
textByHash.b7fa0a34ddf7406b4862530f0590fd50ae11871e: Just because she's a surface-dweller, doesn't mean she's ! There are lots of surface-dwellers!
textByHash.c462b85f0fb0faadb7f554c8803da96cd87e5567: Oh, hello! Children, say hello to the surface-dweller.
